_about: Theme registry. Add your theme entry here to make it selectable in-app.
_note: Keys starting with '_' are documentation and safely ignored by Gson.

themes._comment_themeName: Display name shown in the theme selector dropdown [String]
themes._comment_cardFrontPath: Path to card front image, relative to basePath [String]
themes._comment_cardBackPath: Path to card back image, relative to basePath [String]
themes._comment_chipFrontPath: Path to chip front image, relative to basePath [String]
themes._comment_chipBackPath: Path to chip back image, relative to basePath [String]
themes._comment_backgroundPath: Path to table background image, relative to basePath [String]
themes._comment_suitStyleKey: Key into suits.json for suit group colors [String]
themes._comment_basePath: Base resource path for resolving relative image paths. For external themes, set to the theme directory [String]
themes._comment_guiKey: Key into gui.json for all UI font/color settings [String]
themes._comment_cursorKey: Key into cursor.json for remote cursor settings [String]
